## Summary

<!-- one or two sentences -->

## Changes

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new tool
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build / project hygiene

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Locales validated (`python tests/check_locales.py`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] If a new tool: pure-logic in `gui/engine.py`, GUI frame in `gui/tools.py`,
      i18n keys added in EN / FR / ZH

## Scope confirmation

- [ ] This change is for **education / authorized pentest / CTF** use only.
- [ ] It does **not** add phishing kits, hidden RATs, keyloggers, spycams, or DDoS tools.
